🏕️ Camping

Camp setups, overnight notes, gear adjustments, and places worth returning to.

April 30, 2026 Camping Explore Graham Cabin

Graham Cabin Overnighter

The three hour trip bouncing along winding backcountry roads on underinflated tires was well worth the reward at the end of the road.

Conditions

Weather Sunny and Clear
Temperature 70s
Light Bright
April 29, 2026 Camping Build Backyard

Backyard Fire Ring

Last weekend I gathered some stones and built a fire pit. I dig it.

April 27, 2026 Camping Observe Somewhere off the main road

First Entry

Camp went up fast once the wind dropped. Stove on the tailgate, damp boots by the fire ring, and just enough daylight left to mark the trailhead on the map before supper.

Conditions

Temperature
